title: Bashi-Achuki
writer: Leo Esakia, Petre Gruzinski, Lado Karsanidze
actors: Otar Koberidze, Dodo Abashidze, Lia Eliava
plot: Bashi-Achiki is a hero in personal and patriotic battlefields during an uprising against Persian conquerors. Started in Kakheti, the uprising spread all over the Georgia and lead to Bakhtrioni war of liberation.
